title: Salty Flaky Middle Eastern Feta Crumble
description: A date-night polish dish featuring cubed feta cheese in a salty and flaky texture, perfect for those who enjoy Mediterranean flavors.

ingredients.name: 1 cup (200g) cubed feta cheese
ingredients.notes: ensure it's halal and at room temperature

instructions: Melt the butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and stir for about 1 minute until fragrant but not burnt.
Stir in salt and feta cheese cubes, mixing well until evenly coated with the melted butter mixture.
Transfer the feta-crumbled mixture onto an oven-safe plate or baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top. Avoid over-baking as it may cause cheese to dry out.
Remove from oven, let cool slightly before serving.
